title: Todo 8/24/23 (OSU senior fall + Jordan/Egypt prep)
html:
TL;DR

  • Final-OSU-class signup (Software Engineering II candidate); PCC essay still pending.
  • $PHIB direction conversation queued with Jipp — late-2023 portfolio check-in.
  • Jordan/Egypt trip prep: visas, Petra→Alexandria flights booked, itinerary still rough.
  • Read-list anchors: Paul Graham's How to Do Great Work, Dale Carnegie's How to Win Friends and Influence People.
  • Done-list reveals the texture: SNAP benefits renewed, Mom's Frontier Pass canceled, ride-to-Eugene secured, Andrew bed-frame pickup arranged via Ayden/Owen.

Notes

Three-bucket todo list (TODAY / This week / Eventually) from the start of Yahir's OSU senior fall. The crypto-portfolio thread continues — "talk to Jipp about plans with $PHIB going forward" — placing PHIB still in active management Aug 2023. The reading list pairs the canonical builder-essay (PG's Great Work) with the canonical schmooze-bible (Carnegie) — the same dual self-curriculum that surfaces in the OSIG workbook and elsewhere. The Jordan/Egypt trip becomes the fall 2023 trip — first appearance of the itinerary in the Google Docs corpus. Domestic logistics show the Mom-handler / younger-brother-handler (Ayden) operating mode he runs by default.
